ui.purpose: Default interface chrome, labels, rows. Editor's UI font.

code.purpose: All literal Git data: diffs, paths, hashes, commit metadata.

subject.purpose: Commit subjects and summary headlines, heaviest weight.

micro.purpose: Timestamps, refs, hunk headers. Density floor at 10-11px.

shadows.name: menu-lift
shadows.purpose: The only shadow. Floating context menus exclusively; never resting surfaces.

motion.name: action-reveal
motion.purpose: Row actions hide until the row is engaged. Must respect prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Toolbar Button
components.description: Secondary action button in the top app toolbar.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-toolbar"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-3-6.7L21 8"/><path d="M21 3v5h-5"/></svg>Fetch</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-toolbar { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; height:22px; min-height:22px; padding:0 8px; border:1px solid var(--vscode-input-border, var(--vscode-panel-border)); border-radius:3px; background:var(--vscode-button-secondaryBackground); color:var(--vscode-button-secondaryForeground); font:inherit; cursor:pointer; } .ds-btn-toolbar:hover { background:var(--vscode-button-secondaryHoverBackground); border-color:var(--vscode-focusBorder); } .ds-btn-toolbar:focus-visible { outline:none; border-color:var(--vscode-focusBorder); }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Square icon-only toggle; .active shows engaged state.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-icon active" aria-pressed="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-icon { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:26px; height:24px; padding:0; border:1px solid var(--vscode-input-border, var(--vscode-panel-border)); background:transparent; color:var(--vscode-foreground); cursor:pointer; } .ds-btn-icon:hover { border-color:var(--vscode-focusBorder); } .ds-btn-icon.active { background:var(--vscode-button-background); color:var(--vscode-button-foreground); border-color:transparent; }

components.name: Branch Row
components.description: Locations-pane branch entry; .current marks the checked-out branch.
components.html: <button class="ds-row-branch current"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="6" y1="3" x2="6" y2="15"/><circle cx="18" cy="6" r="3"/><circle cx="6" cy="18" r="3"/><path d="M18 9a9 9 0 0 1-9 9"/></svg>main</button>
components.css: .ds-row-branch { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; height:20px; width:100%; padding:0 10px 0 18px; border:0; background:transparent; color:var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); text-align:left; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; font:inherit; cursor:pointer; } .ds-row-branch:hover { background:var(--vscode-list-hoverBackground); color:var(--vscode-foreground); } .ds-row-branch.current { font-weight:700; color:var(--vscode-foreground); background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--vscode-list-activeSelectionBackground) 45%, transparent); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: File status indicator; .staged switches to green-on-transparent. Status by letter + color, never color alone.
components.css: .ds-status-badge { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:26px; height:16px; border-radius:2px; background:var(--vscode-list-inactiveSelectionBackground); color:#bc4d4d; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; } .ds-status-badge.staged { background:transparent; color:var(--vscode-gitDecoration-addedResourceForeground); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input; focus shifts border to Focus Blue, no glow.
components.css: .ds-input { height:24px; padding:0 6px; border:1px solid var(--vscode-input-border, var(--vscode-panel-border)); border-radius:3px; background:var(--vscode-input-background); color:var(--vscode-foreground); font:inherit; } .ds-input:focus { outline:none; border-color:var(--vscode-focusBorder); }

components.name: Commit Row
components.description: History entry: graph rail + node, bold subject, mono metadata, hover-revealed action.
components.html:
feat: add diff parsing
aa7b866 - andre - 2h ago
components.css: .ds-commit-row { position:relative; display:grid; grid-template-columns:24px minmax(0,1fr) auto; gap:5px; align-items:center; min-height:54px; padding:7px 10px 6px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--vscode-widget-border, var(--vscode-panel-border)); background:var(--vscode-editor-background); } .ds-commit-row::before { content:""; position:absolute; left:10px; top:0; bottom:0; width:2px; background:var(--vscode-focusBorder); } .ds-commit-row:hover { background:var(--vscode-list-activeSelectionBackground); } .ds-commit-node { width:10px; height:10px; margin:0 auto; border-radius:999px; background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--vscode-focusBorder) 18%, transparent); } .ds-commit-subject { font-weight:700; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; } .ds-commit-meta { margin-top:3px; font-size:11px; font-family:var(--vscode-editor-font-family); color:var(--vscode-descriptionForeground); } .ds-commit-action { opacity:0; min-height:20px; font-size:11px; border:1px solid var(--vscode-input-border); border-radius:3px; background:var(--vscode-button-secondaryBackground); color:var(--vscode-button-secondaryForeground); cursor:pointer; } .ds-commit-row:hover .ds-commit-action { opacity:1; }

narrative.overview: CodeMerge owns almost no color of its own. Every surface, border, and accent resolves through a var(--vscode-*) token, so the client wears whatever theme the editor wears: Dark+, Light+, Solarized, High Contrast, all of them, with zero per-theme work. Identity here is adaptiveness, not a signature palette. The second law is density: 12px base, 10-11px metadata, a Sublime Merge-style three-column control surface packed edge to edge, 2-3px radii, no card chrome. A power tool for developers who already know Git.
keyCharacteristics: Color sourced from VS Code theme tokens, never hardcoded.
Flat by default; the only shadow lifts floating menus.
Mono (--vscode-editor-font-family) for code, paths, and commit metadata.

rules.name: The Borrowed Color Rule
rules.body: No hardcoded hex except where a VS Code token genuinely does not exist. Today that is exactly two values (#3f78b7, #bc4d4d) plus one shadow rgba. Adding a third is forbidden without first proving no --vscode-* token fits.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Focus Blue is the only interaction accent. Purple is a graph-rhythm device, green/red are Git status semantics. Do not introduce a fourth brand color.

rules.name: The Mono-Means-Git Rule
rules.body: Literal repository data (paths, hashes, diff lines, commit metadata) renders in --vscode-editor-font-family. Interface chrome renders in --vscode-font-family. Never mix the two roles.

rules.name: The Flat-Plane Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest and stay flat on hover. Hover changes background tint, never elevation. The single shadow is reserved for floating context menus.

dos: Do source every color from a var(--vscode-*) token so the UI tracks the active theme, including High Contrast and High Contrast Light.
Do keep the base at 12px and reach for 11px/10px for metadata; density is the product.
Do keep radii at 2-3px and dividers at 1px hairlines.
Do use mono (--vscode-editor-font-family) for all literal Git data and UI sans for chrome.
Do pair status color with a glyph, letter, or position, never color alone.
Do signal interaction with a Focus Blue border shift; reserve the one shadow for floating menus only.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion; the opacity reveals and hover tints must never be required to understand state.
donts: Don't hardcode a hex without proving no --vscode-* token fits; the system has exactly two such exceptions and they are debts, not patterns.
Don't add resting shadows or card lift. Flat plane at rest, tint on hover.
Don't use border-left/border-right over 1px as a colored accent stripe on rows, callouts, or alerts.
Don't introduce playful consumer-SaaS gloss: pastel cards, big rounded corners, mascots, illustrations.
Don't ship the generic AI-dashboard kit: gradient hero metrics, identical card grids, gradient text, glassmorphism.
Don't wrap content in card containers; this UI is panes and rows, not cards. Nested cards are always wrong.
Don't add a fourth brand accent. Focus Blue is the accent; purple is graph rhythm; green/red are Git status.
